mapper.select:
SELECT PP.PRODUCEDT, PP.PLANTCD, PP.PARTNO, PP.ORDERNUM, PP.ORDERSEQ, PP.PRODUCEQTY, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, G.UNIT, ISNULL(SQ.STOCKQTY, 0) AS STOCKQTY, C.COMPANYNM, ISNULL(D.REQQTY, 0) AS REQQTY FROM TBL_PROD_PRODUCEPLAN PP LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON PP.PARTNO = G.PARTNO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT L.PARTNO, L.WORKPLACECD, SUM(S.STOCKQTY) AS STOCKQTY FROM TBL_PROD_STOCK S INNER JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE L ON S.LOTNO = L.LOTNO GROUP BY L.PARTNO, L.WORKPLACECD ) SQ ON PP.PARTNO = SQ.PARTNO AND PP.PLANTCD = SQ.WORKPLACECD LEFT JOIN TBL_INOUT_ORDERS O ON PP.ORDERNUM = CAST(O.ORDERNO AS VARCHAR(50)) LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_COMPANY C ON O.COMPANYCD = C.COMPANYCD LEFT JOIN TBL_INOUT_ORDER_DETAIL D ON PP.ORDERNUM = CAST(D.ORDERNO AS VARCHAR(50)) AND PP.ORDERSEQ = D.SEQ AND PP.PARTNO = D.PARTNO
PP.PLANTCD = #{plant_cd} AND PP.PRODUCEDT >= #{start_date} AND PP.PRODUCEDT <= #{end_date} AND (PP.PARTNO LIKE #{search} OR G.PARTNM LIKE #{search} OR C.COMPANYNM LIKE #{search})
ORDER BY PP.PARTNO, PP.PRODUCEDT
mapper.insert: MERGE TBL_PROD_PRODUCEPLAN AS T USING (SELECT #{PRODUCEDT} AS PRODUCEDT, #{PLANTCD} AS PLANTCD, #{PARTNO} AS PARTNO, #{ORDERNUM} AS ORDERNUM, #{ORDERSEQ} AS ORDERSEQ) AS S ON T.PRODUCEDT = S.PRODUCEDT AND T.PLANTCD = S.PLANTCD AND T.PARTNO = S.PARTNO AND T.ORDERNUM = S.ORDERNUM AND T.ORDERSEQ = S.ORDERSEQ WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET PRODUCEQTY = #{PRODUCEQTY}, EDITUSERID = #{EDITUSERID}, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (PRODUCEDT, PLANTCD, PARTNO, ORDERNUM, ORDERSEQ, PRODUCEQTY, REGUSERID, REGDTM) VALUES (#{PRODUCEDT}, #{PLANTCD}, #{PARTNO}, #{ORDERNUM}, #{ORDERSEQ}, #{PRODUCEQTY}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE());
